# Hüseyin DOL — Full Profile

> Senior Frontend Developer with 10+ years of experience building modern, scalable web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Based in Sancaktepe, İstanbul, Turkey.

## About

Hüseyin DOL is a Senior Frontend Developer with more than 10 years of professional experience in web development. He specializes in the React ecosystem, modern JavaScript/TypeScript, and scalable frontend architecture. He is experienced in team leadership, code review, and mentoring junior and mid-level developers.

- Location: Sancaktepe, İstanbul, Turkey
- Email: huseyindol@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/huseyindol
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/huseyindol/
- CV: https://www.huseyindol.com/assets/files/HuseyinDOL.pdf

## Core Technical Skills

### Frontend (Expert)
- React (8+ years)
- Next.js (5+ years)
- TypeScript
- JavaScript (10+ years)
- HTML5 (10+ years)
- CSS3 / Sass (10+ years)
- Tailwind CSS
- Redux (6+ years)
- Framer Motion

### Backend & Databases
- Node.js (7+ years, Advanced)
- Express.js (6+ years, Advanced)
- Prisma (6+ years, Advanced)
- MongoDB (5+ years, Advanced)
- PostgreSQL (3+ years, Intermediate)
- Java / Spring (3+ years, Intermediate)

### DevOps & Tooling
- Git (10+ years, Expert)
- Docker (3+ years, Intermediate)
- Nginx (4+ years, Intermediate)
- Vercel
- Figma (5+ years, Advanced)
- VS Code (8+ years, Expert)
- Postman (6+ years, Advanced)

## Current Tech Stack (This Portfolio)

- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router, Server Components, Server Actions)
- UI: Tailwind CSS 4, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion
- Forms: React Hook Form + Zod 4
- Data Fetching: TanStack Query 5
- Testing: Vitest 4 + Testing Library
- Email: Resend
- Analytics: Google Tag Manager, Vercel Analytics
- Deployment: Vercel

## Blog Articles

### Frontend
- [Next.js ile Kusursuz SEO ve Metadata Yönetimi](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog/frontend-nextjs-seo): Dynamic Content için generateMetadata, robots.txt ve Sitemap.xml ile Google indeks sürelerini minimize etme stratejileri.
- [Elly Admin Panel Mimarisi: Next.js App Router](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog/frontend-nextjs-elly-admin): SSR, Layout pattern ile yetkilendirme katmanları ve Server Actions üzerinden data mutasyonları.
- [React Render Performans Optimizasyonu](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog/frontend-react-performance): React Suspense, Lazy Loading ve RSC konseptleri ile gereksiz re-render problemlerini önleme.
- [GitHub Actions ile NPM Paket Dağıtımı](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog/frontend-npmjs-ci-cd): Main branch'e birleşen kodun otomatik olarak NPM Registry'ye push edilmesi üzerine CI/CD otomasyon deneyimi.
- [Growthbook İle A/B Testleri ve Feature Flag Yönetimi](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog/frontend-growthbook-ab-testing): Newsletter arayüzünün konversiyon oranı üzerinde %50 trafikli A/B test senaryosu.

### Mobile
- [Elly Mobile App: Modern React Native Mimarisi](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog/mobile-react-native-elly): Tam tema destekli (karanlık mod) mimari, form bileşenleri ve navigation yapılandırmaları.

### AI
- [Kendi MCP Sunucunuzu Java/Node İle Yazmak](https://www.huseyindol.com/blog/ai-mcp-integration): Custom tool tanımlamaları ve prompt veritabanı enjekte etme. Açık kaynak: https://github.com/huseyindol/McpProjectScaffold
